title: My Approach
metaDescription: Holistic, client-centered psychotherapy — CBT, IFS, EFT, and more at Voice Awareness.
body:
I adopt a holistic approach to treatment, understanding that an individual's issues are multifaceted, with culture often playing a significant role. I strive to provide care that is centered around you, the client, recognizing that there is no one-size-fits-all solution. What works for one person may not work for another. Therefore, I choose my therapeutic modalities based on what you feel comfortable with rather than what I am most familiar with. Some of the modalities I use include Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT), Solution-Focused Brief Therapy (SFBT), Internal Family Systems (IFS), and Emotionally Focused Therapy (EFT).

## Feeling Trapped in Darkness: Finding Your Way Back to Light and Purpose

Have you ever felt trapped in a dark, inescapable hole, like you've fallen down a well with no way out? It's a terrifying and lonely place to be. Perhaps you've had moments when your thoughts spun endlessly or raced uncontrollably, like a hamster running on a wheel, stuck in repetitive motions with no end. If this sounds familiar, you're not alone.

Many of us experience this feeling of being stuck at some point. It might stem from challenging life circumstances like job loss, a complicated relationship, or a significant life transition. Or perhaps the turmoil comes from within—disruptive thoughts, entrenched thinking patterns, unproductive lifestyles, and ingrained habits that seem impossible to break.

Let the voice be heard and understand the root causes of feeling trapped in darkness. We must understand what's keeping us there before we can find a way out of the darkness. The real reasons behind our actions often lie deep within our subconscious mind. These hidden motivations can drive our behaviours and decisions without us realizing them. We might feel an overwhelming sense of frustration or despair yet cannot pinpoint precisely why.

## The Journey to Self-Discovery

The journey to uncovering your true self and reaching your full potential begins with self-discovery. This involves diving into your unconscious mind to explore the deep-seated beliefs, fears, and desires that shape your life. It can be a daunting process, but it is also incredibly rewarding.

## Finding the Light

Please don't wait any longer to embark on this journey. I understand the darkness you may feel because I've been there, too, and I know how overwhelming it can be. But I also believe it's possible to find your way out of the abyss and move toward a life filled with light, clarity, and purpose.

Together, we can work to guide you out of that darkness. By delving into your unconscious mind and discovering your true self, you can break free from the repetitive cycles that hold you back. You have the power to create a life full of meaning and fulfilment. Always remember that you are not alone in this journey. Reach out for support, take small steps each day, and have faith in your ability to overcome your challenges. The path to light and purpose is within your reach.
